features: DELICIOUSLY MOISTURISING: Pepsi fan alert! Discover our sweet lip balm multipack, a collection of deliciously flavoured lip balms formulated with beeswax to moisturise your lips. Apply to lips as often as you like!

EVERYDAY FUN TO GIVE: Our Pepsi flavoured lip care collection tastes just like your favourite drinks whilst moisturising your lips! Makes the perfect birthday gift or party bag / Christmas stocking filler.
CRUELTY FREE: Our flavoured lip balm collection is not tested on animals. And as Read My Lips has a cruelty-free policy, none of the ingredients present in our gift set is tested on animals either.

8 ORIGINAL PEPSI FIZZY DRINKS FLAVOURS: This cute lip balm party pack contains eight original Pepsi flavours (that are not to eat). Pepsi / Pepsi Lime / Pepsi Mango / Pepsi Cherry / Pepsi Cherry Vanilla / Pepsi Max / Mountain Dew / 7UP.

READ MY LIPS: When your favourite treats meet passionate experts in the lip care industry, you end up with lip balms as sweet, fun and colourful as they can get! Check out our other Read My Lips goodies for more fun flavoured cosmetics!
description: Product Description Read My Lips offers a wide range of fun lip care products that will sweeten your day. Ever dreamt of being able to have the mouth-watering taste of your favourite sodas on your lips anytime you want? Well now, you can! If you are looking for novelty Christmas gifts or fun gifts to fill your party bags and xmas stockings, look no further! Ingredients common to all lip balms: Paraffinum Liquidum, Polyisobutene, Ethylhexyl Palmitate, Ozokerite, Cera Alba, Microcrystalline Wax, Ricinus Communis Seed Oil, Aroma, Phenoxyethanol, Tocopheryl Acetate Pepsi and Pepsi Max Lip Balm: Cinnamal, Citral, Limonene, CI 42090, CI 19140, CI 16035 Pepsi Cherry Lip Balm: Cinnamal, Citral, Limonene, Linalool, CI 19140, CI 16035 Pepsi Mountain Dew Lip Balm: Citral, Limonene, Linalool, CI 42090, CI 19140 Pepsi Cherry Vanilla Lip Balm: Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Benzoate, Benzyl Salicylate, Hexyl Cinnamal, Hydroxycitronellal, CI 42090, CI 19140, CI 16035 Pepsi Lime Lip Balm: Benzyl Alcohol, Citral, Limonene, Linalool, CI 42090, CI 19140, CI 16035 Pepsi Mango Lip Balm: Geraniol, Limonene, Linalool, CI 42090, CI 19140, CI 16035 7UP Lip Balm: Citral, Limonene, Linalool Directions Apply balm to lips as often as needed for moisturizing. Safety Warning For external use only. Do not eat. See more
